name: Black Rainbow Mystery: Amazon Escape
short_description: Escape Amazon forest, solve puzzles, find hidden clues, survive the curse! Set on the journey and explore dozens of locations; forest, old temples, forgotten villages and much more. Use your surviving skills and techniques to escape the inevitable.
detailed_description:
Escape the dangerous forest of Amazon in this immersive hidden-object puzzle adventure game!

When a dark curse ignites the jungle, a brave explorer must escape the burning Amazon village, explore lost temples, and uncover the truth behind the legendary Black Rainbow. If you love story-driven point-and-click adventures, this one’s for you.

Set on the journey and explore dozens of locations; forest, old temples, forgotten villages and much more. Use your surviving skills and techniques to escape the inevitable in this thrilling hidden object puzzle adventure game!

🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Dozens of locations & mini-games – mystery lurks from every dark corner.

🗺️ Map & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Full voiceovers & HD visuals – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge: Casual, Adventure, and Challenging difficulty modes. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

  • FIND your way out of the dark forest of Amazon

  • INVESTIGATE mysterious and unusual locations

  • FIND useful hidden objects

  • SEARCH through dozens of hidden and sacred places

  • HELP people of Amazon to stop the darkness

  • SOLVE dozens of exciting mini-games

  • WIN achievements

  • READ the diary as your ADVENTURE continues

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Korean
*languages with full audio support
